title: Two US servicemen reported missing in Morocco while attending African Lion 2026 military exercise; rescue op underway
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Two US servicemen have been reported missing.
*   Their disappearance occurred in Morocco during the African Lion 2026 military exercise.
*   A rescue operation is currently underway.

title: Cabinet to soon approve ₹37,500 crore incentive scheme to promote coal gasification projects
content:
The Cabinet is soon expected to approve a new incentive scheme.
*   The scheme is valued at ₹37,500 crore.
*   Its purpose is to promote and support coal gasification projects.

title: Crowdfunding helps Serbian birdwatchers save woodland
content:
Serbian birdwatchers successfully protected local woodland.
*   Their conservation initiative was made possible through crowdfunding.
*   The funds raised via crowdfunding were instrumental in preserving the habitat.
